'''Soron Hegerty''' was a [[Human/Legends|human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Xenobiologist/Legends|xenobiologist]] who served the [[Imperial Remnant]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. Hegerty had previously worked for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] under the [[Imperial Species Identification Bureau]].

==Biography==
Soron Hegerty was raised in the [[Apgar system/Legends|Apgar system]] by her father, a member of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. With the coming of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]], her father was ordered to take control of the system from the elected leadership. With his influence, Soron gained employment with the [[Imperial Species Identification Bureau]]. Her career was short lived, however, as her recommendations were frequently ignored, largely due to the [[High Human Culture/Legends|Human High Culture]] policy of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Becoming disillusioned, she began to cooperate with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. After discovering the [[Ssither]], she faked her own death in a crash, to work with the species, later spearheading the effort to relocate them from [[Jatee]] to [[Butler's Cove]].

During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], on the urging of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Crowal]], she helped the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] in their search for [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] and was on board the ''[[Jade Shadow]]'' when the planet was located. She was almost kidnapped by a group [[Ferroan]]s unwelcome to the Jedi.
